headline: Is Lennar’s New Clarksville Community a Clue to Its Evolving Market Strategy (LEN)?
summary: Lennar recently held the grand opening of Lisenbee Fields, a master-planned community of single-family homes and townhomes with resort-style amenities in Clarksville, Tennessee, inviting prospective residents to tour model homes and enjoy complimentary food and drinks on June 4. The project, located near Fort Campbell and downtown Clarksville and sold with Lennar’s Everything’s Included® features, highlights the company’s focus on pairing convenience with move-in-ready value in growing...
